title: Results
description: View competition results and standings here.

discovery.title: Find official results
discovery.description: Filter by event context and search by name or bib to locate the official page quickly.

directory.title: Official results directory
directory.description: Published official result pages by edition.
directory.empty: No official editions match the selected context.

searchResults.title: Search matches
searchResults.description: Official-entry matches for your current name/bib filters.
searchResults.empty: No official matches found for this search.

panel.title: How it works
panel.description: Quick trust summary for official results and rankings.
panel.point1: Official means organizer-finalized publication for this edition.
panel.point2: Corrections publish as new versions with visible history.
panel.point3: Rankings use published official versions only.

explainer.title: Official results and rankings transparency
explainer.description: This page explains what official means, how corrections are published, and how rankings consume official versions.

officialMeaning.title: What “Official” means
officialMeaning.point1: Official results are published by the event organizer as the accountable authority.
officialMeaning.point2: Draft data is not presented as official public record.

correctionProcess.title: How corrections work
correctionProcess.point1: Approved corrections publish a new corrected version instead of overwriting history.
correctionProcess.point2: Public pages expose correction context so changes remain transparent.

rankingsRules.title: How rankings use results
rankingsRules.point1: Rankings are computed from published official/corrected versions only.
rankingsRules.point2: Ruleset references are versioned so outputs remain reproducible.

corrections.title: Recent correction summaries
corrections.description: When official data is corrected, we publish a concise summary with attribution and timing.

fallback.noChanges: No detailed field changes were provided.

official.title: {seriesName} {editionLabel} Official Results
official.subtitle: This stable URL always points to the latest official or corrected publication for this edition.

trustScan.title: Trust scan
trustScan.description: Immediate legitimacy cues for this official publication.

table.title: Official ledger rows
table.description: Public row sample from the active official publication.
table.empty: No published entries are available yet for this official version.

nonOfficial.description: Official results are not finalized for this edition yet.
nonOfficial.noDraftDisclosure: Draft and non-official data are not exposed from this public URL.
